query:
INSERT INTO stamp_transactions (userId, orderId, action, stamps, description)
SELECT st.userId, st.orderId, 'deduct', -st.stamps, 'Stamps deducted - order cancelled'
FROM stamp_transactions st
WHERE st.orderId = (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00107')
AND st.action = 'earn'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM stamp_transactions st2 
  WHERE st2.orderId = st.orderId AND st2.action = 'deduct'
);
